parks.title: All parks

practical.subtitle: The visitor essentials currently available for this park.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Find the park on the map and review its coordinates.

nearby.subtitle: Continue your discovery with parks located around this destination.

nearby.emptyMessage: No nearby park has been found around this destination.

description.title: About this park
description.empty: No rich description is available for this park yet.

identity.subtitle: Structural data currently available in the park model.

publication.title: Publication
publication.subtitle: Visibility and home highlight data from the park model.

zones.title: Zones and lands
zones.subtitle: Quickly find the attractions and places linked to each area of the park.
zones.noDescription: No description is available for this zone yet.

itemsMap.subtitle: Find the geolocated items in this park and filter the map by zone or category.
itemsMap.emptyMessage: No geolocated item currently matches the selected filters.

comingSoon.message: This section will be connected to a reliable source in a future step.

weather.subtitle: A compact forecast planned to help prepare the visit.

prices.title: Prices
prices.subtitle: Tickets, passes and pricing information will be added later.
